compressed_prompt: Write the lyrics to a hit song by the rock band 'The Gifted and The Not Gifted'. To make it rocky, the response should be in all capital letters. The word "rock" should not appear in your response.
response:
(VERSES)
I GOT A PHD IN MISERY
YOU GOT A CERTIFICATE IN BLAME
WE’RE A PERFECT SYMMETRY
PLAYING THE SAME OLD GAME
YOU SCREAM YOUR POETRY
I GRUNT MY MONOSYLLABIC NAME
A BEAUTIFUL CATASTROPHY
AND WE AIN’T TAKING ANY SHAME

(CHORUS)
WE ARE THE GIFTED AND THE NOT!
A FIERY, CLASHING LOT!
BURNING BRIDGES, TAKING SHOTS!
THE GIFTED AND THE NOT!
YEAH!

(SOLO - SCREECHING GUITAR, POUNDING DRUMS)

(VERSES)
YOU PAINT THE SISTINE CEILING
I SPILL THE BEER ON THE FLOOR
SAME VOLCANIC FEELING
KICKING DOWN THE DOOR
YOU CALCULATE THE MEANING
I JUST WANT TO ROAR
TWO HALVES OF A BROKEN THING
SCREAMING OUT FOR MORE

(CHORUS)
WE ARE THE GIFTED AND THE NOT!
A FIERY, CLASHING LOT!
BURNING BRIDGES, TAKING SHOTS!
THE GIFTED AND THE NOT!
YEAH!

(BRIDGE)
THE SCHOLAR AND THE SAVAGE
THE FLAME AND THE SMOKE
A SYMPHONY OF DAMAGE
THE FINAL JOKE
WE CRACK THE FOUNDATION
WITH EVERY WORD WE SAY
THIS GLORIOUS COLLISION
WON’T FADE AWAY!

(OUTRO)
GIFTED! NOT!
GIFTED! NOT!
SMASH THE CLOCK!
NEVER STOP!
GIFTED! NOT!
GIFTED! NOT!
SCREAM IT LOUD UNTIL WE DROP!
YEAHHHHHHHH!
